content: Digg. Or Die. DIGGER. Only in theaters October 2. #Diggermovie Academy Award winner Tom Cruise stars in Academy Award-winning filmmaker Alejandro G. Iñárritu’s original film “Digger,” from Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures. The most powerful man in the world embarks on a frantic mission to prove he is humanity’s savior before the disaster he’s unleashed destroys everything. Cruise stars in the title role, alongside Oscar winner Riz Ahmed, John Goodman, Oscar nominee Sandra Hüller, Michael Stuhlbarg, and Oscar nominee Jesse Plemons. Robert John Burke, Emma D’Arcy, Burn Gorman and Sophie Wilde also star. Iñárritu directed from a screenplay by Iñárritu & Oscar-winners Alexander Dinelaris & Nicolás Giacobone, and Sabina Berman, story by Iñárritu & Berman. The film is produced by Iñárritu, Oscar nominee Mary Parent, Cruise and Michael Sharp, and executive produced by Joshua Grode, Berman, Dinelaris, Giacobone, Jez Butterworth and Emmanuel Lubezki. Joining Iñárritu behind the camera are previous collaborators Oscar-winning director of photography Emmanuel Lubezki; editors Conor O’Neill and Oscar winner Stephen Mirrone; Oscar-nominated costume designer Jacqueline West; Oscar-winning makeup and hair designer Alessandro Bertolazzi; and Oscar-nominated casting director Francine Maisler; along with Oscar-winning production designer Dennis Gassner and production designer Richard Johnson, Oscar-winning prosthetic makeup designer Kazu Hiro, and composer Cosmo Sheldrake. An Alejandro G. Iñárritu Film, “Digger” was shot entirely in VistaVision and will be released in theaters and IMAX® across North America on October 2, 2026, and internationally beginning 30 September 2026. It will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.
chineseTitle: | 挖 | 掘 | 机 | | | | 官 | 方 | 预 | 告 | 片 |
chineseContent: 挖。要么死。挖掘机。仅限 10 月 2 日在影院上映。 #Diggermovie 奥斯卡金像奖得主汤姆·克鲁斯 (Tom Cruise) 主演奥斯卡奖获奖电影制片人亚历杭德罗·G·伊纳里图 (Alejandro G. Iñárritu) 的原创电影《Digger》，由华纳兄弟影业和传奇影业出品。世界上最有权势的人开始执行一项疯狂的任务，以在他发动的灾难摧毁一切之前证明他是人类的救世主。克鲁斯与奥斯卡奖得主里兹·艾哈迈德、约翰·古德曼、奥斯卡提名人桑德拉·惠勒、迈克尔·斯图巴和奥斯卡提名人杰西·普莱蒙一起主演。罗伯特·约翰·伯克、艾玛·达西、伯恩·戈曼和苏菲·王尔德也出演。伊纳里图执导，剧本由伊纳里图和奥斯卡奖得主亚历山大·迪内拉里斯和尼古拉斯·贾科博恩以及萨宾娜·伯曼编写，故事由伊纳里图和伯曼编写。该片由伊纳里图、奥斯卡提名人玛丽·帕伦特、克鲁斯和迈克尔·夏普担任制片人，并由约书亚·格罗德、伯曼、迪内拉里斯、贾科博恩、杰斯·巴特沃斯和伊曼纽尔·卢贝兹基担任监制。加入伊纳里图幕后的还有之前的合作者、奥斯卡获奖摄影指导伊曼纽尔·卢贝兹基 (Emmanuel Lubezki)；编辑康纳·奥尼尔和奥斯卡奖得主斯蒂芬·米罗尼；奥斯卡提名服装设计师杰奎琳·韦斯特；奥斯卡获奖化妆和发型设计师 Alessandro Bertolazzi；和奥斯卡提名选角导演弗朗辛·梅斯勒；以及奥斯卡获奖制作设计师丹尼斯·加斯纳（Dennis Gassner）和制作设计师理查德·约翰逊（Richard Johnson），奥斯卡获奖假肢化妆设计师和宏（Kazu Hiro）以及作曲家科斯莫·谢尔德雷克（Cosmo Sheldrake）。亚历杭德罗·G·伊纳里图 (Alejandro G. Iñárritu) 的电影《挖掘者》完全在 VistaVision 中拍摄，将于 2026 年 10 月 2 日在北美影院和 IMAX® 上映，并于 2026 年 9 月 30 日开始在全球上映。该片将由华纳兄弟影业发行。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
